children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided by this section, eligibility for promotion of officers in any competitive category of officers designated for purposes of this subchapter shall be governed by the provisions of .section 619 of this title

children.heading: .—Inapplicability of Certain Time-in-grade Requirements
children.label: b .—Inapplicability of Certain Time-in-grade Requirements
children.text: Paragraphs (2) through (4) of shall not apply to the promotion of officers described in subsection (a).1section 619(a) of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.heading: .—Inapplicability to Officers Above and Below Promotion Zone
children.label: c .—Inapplicability to Officers Above and Below Promotion Zone

children.text: The reference in paragraph (1) of that section to an officer above the promotion zone.

children.heading: .—Inapplicability of Requirement Relating to Opportunities for Consideration for Promotion
children.label: d .—Inapplicability of Requirement Relating to Opportunities for Consideration for Promotion
children.text: shall not apply to the promotion of officers described in subsection (a) to the extent that such section is inconsistent with a number of opportunities for promotion specified pursuant to .Section 645(1)(A)(i)(I) of this titlesection 649d of this title
An officer described in .section 619(d) of this title
An officer not included within the promotion zone.

An officer who has failed of promotion to a higher grade the maximum number of times specified for opportunities for promotion for such grade within the competitive category concerned pursuant to .section 649d of this title
An officer recommended by a selection board to be removed from consideration for promotion in accordance with .section 649b(c) of this title
